_meta.notes: Names, roles, regions, and contacts are complete. bio_excerpt fields are the visible opening lines only — FULL bios and photo URLs live inside the page's click-to-open popups, which a remote fetch cannot open. Completion path: save the live page from a browser (Ctrl/Cmd-S, 'Webpage, Complete') into data/source/, then run the companion prompt so Claude Code extracts full bios and images locally. Emails were public on the source page; decide deliberately whether to display them on the new site.
